modals.loginDescription: You're doing great! Sign in to save your completed sentences and easily track your learning journey.
modals.completionDescription: You've mastered this session. Ready for what's next?

home.badge: The New Standard in Language Learning
home.description: Fluenrin is not just another flashcard application. It is a carefully engineered environment designed for serious learners. By combining the proven methodologies of Shadowing and Dictation, Fluenrin forces your brain to actively process language.
home.scienceDesc1: Most language learners spend years passively watching videos or clicking multiple-choice answers without ever improving their spoken fluency. Fluenrin changes this paradigm by requiring active participation.
home.scienceDesc2: When you use our Dictation mode, you are training your ear to catch every subtle native sound, linking phonetics directly to spelling. It reveals the blind spots in your listening skills that passive watching hides.
home.scienceDesc3: Transitioning to Shadowing, you immediately apply what you've heard. By mimicking the rhythm, intonation, and stress of native speakers in real-time, you reprogram your vocal muscles to speak English naturally, breaking away from translated, robotic speech.
home.scienceQuote: "Fluency is a habit, not a destination."
home.featuresSubtitle: Everything you need to reach the next level.
home.featureShadowingDesc: Listen to native audio and speak aloud simultaneously. Perfect your rhythm, tone, and connected speech.
home.featureDictationDesc: Type exactly what you hear. This intense exercise forces you to recognize linking sounds and weak forms.
home.featureVocabularyDesc: Stop memorizing isolated words. Learn vocabulary within the context of real sentences and situations.
home.ctaDesc: Join Fluenrin today and transform the way you learn English. Consistent, focused practice yields the best results.

header.reviewHubDesc: Review your saved words and sentences.
header.mockTestDesc: Take a full CEFR standard test.
header.discussionsDesc: Ask questions and share study tips.

footer.aboutDesc: Fluenrin is your personal AI Language Coach — engineered to help you master English through active immersion, precise shadowing, and smart dictation practice.
